select_when: A solution space is better explored by generating variants, testing them, and letting evidence eliminate weak options.
The environment is noisy or hard to model directly, so iterative experimentation beats static up-front prediction.
The team needs to reason from variation, selection, and retention rather than from one master-plan explanation.
Adaptive strategy depends on ecosystem feedback more than on one perfect design assumption.
avoid_when: The language of emergence is being used to avoid setting goals, decision rights, or fitness criteria in a human system.
The analogy is being applied on surface similarity without checking whether the structural selection mechanism really matches.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model on variation, selection, and retention under evidence rather than on loose Darwinian rhetoric.
donor_drops: Did not widen Wave 4 or import donor-shaped higher-order semantics in this coverage batch.
Kept the routing surface conservative so Layer 2B stays canonical and Waves 2 to 4 stay preview-only.
open_questions: Wave 4 candidacy stays observational only for this batch.

select_when.note: Select conditions stay close to the source activation language and are compressed only enough for routing use.

avoid_when.note: Avoid conditions preserve the source anti-patterns and misuse warnings with conservative normalization.

input_type.note: The typed input label is a reviewed routing compression of the source context.

output_type.note: The typed output label compresses the intervention shape implied by the raw source.

reasoning_types.note: Reasoning taxonomy labels are normalized onto the existing Layer 2B vocabulary.
